title: Senior Software Engineer
description: We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join a leading fintech client. You will architect and build scalable backend services using Node.js and AWS.

title: Financial Analyst
description: Join a top-tier investment firm as a Financial Analyst. Responsibilities include financial modeling, variance analysis, and executive reporting.
requirements: CFA preferred, 3+ years in finance, Excel, PowerBI

title: DevOps Engineer
description: 6-month contract role with a healthcare technology company. Own CI/CD pipelines, Kubernetes clusters, and cloud infrastructure on Azure.
requirements: Docker, Kubernetes, Azure, Terraform, 4+ years DevOps
